mapper.select:
SELECT r.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, r.description AS description, r.user_count AS userCount, r.create_time AS createTime, r.status AS status, CASE r.status WHEN 1 THEN 'enabled' WHEN 0 THEN 'disabled' ELSE 'unknown' END AS statusText FROM sys_role r WHERE r.is_deleted = 0
AND r.role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY r.update_time DESC, r.role_id DESC
SELECT r.role_id FROM sys_role r WHERE r.role_id <= #{maxAllowedId} ORDER BY r.role_id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT rp.id FROM sys_role_permission rp WHERE rp.id <= #{maxAllowedId} ORDER BY rp.id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role ( role_id, role_name, description, user_count, status, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{roleId}, #{roleName}, #{description}, #{userCount}, #{status}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET role_name = #{roleName}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT r.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, r.description AS description, r.user_count AS userCount, r.status AS status, CASE r.status WHEN 1 THEN 'enabled' WHEN 0 THEN 'disabled' ELSE 'unknown' END AS statusText, r.create_time AS createTime, r.update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_role r WHERE r.role_id = #{roleId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT r.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, r.description AS description, r.user_count AS userCount, r.status AS status, CASE r.status WHEN 1 THEN 'enabled' WHEN 0 THEN 'disabled' ELSE 'unknown' END AS statusText, r.create_time AS createTime, r.update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_role r WHERE r.role_id = #{roleId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user u WHERE u.role_id = #{roleId} AND u.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_role_permission SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT MIN(rp.id) AS permissionId, rp.permission_code AS permissionCode, MAX( CASE WHEN rp.permission_name IS NULL OR rp.permission_name = '' THEN rp.permission_code ELSE rp.permission_name END ) AS permissionName FROM sys_role_permission rp WHERE rp.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY rp.permission_code ORDER BY rp.permission_code ASC

SELECT rp.id AS permissionId, rp.permission_code AS permissionCode, CASE WHEN rp.permission_name IS NULL OR rp.permission_name = '' THEN rp.permission_code ELSE rp.permission_name END AS permissionName FROM sys_role_permission rp WHERE rp.is_deleted = 0 AND rp.id IN
#{permissionId}
SELECT DISTINCT rp.permission_code FROM sys_role_permission rp WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND rp.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role_permission ( id, role_id, permission_code, permission_name, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{roleId}, #{permissionCode}, #{permissionName}, #{isDeleted} )
